_meta.label: synthetic-malformed-402
_meta.description: Synthetic fail-closed fixture: HTTP 402 with no x402 payment-requirements field anywhere (neither body nor payment-required header). Parser must reject with no_payment_requirements.
_meta.purpose: Per BAT-582 v1.6 contract amendment 2 — fail-closed proof that we don't accept malformed 402 responses as payable.

body.message: Some service-specific error message that doesn't conform to x402
